caption: The video begins with a close-up of a person's hand holding an e-reader, displaying a page from a book titled "Une vie d'éléphant" in French. The scene then transitions to another close-up, this time showing a hand interacting with a tablet screen. The tablet displays an educational application called "Countries of the World," featuring options such as "Study," "Test," and "Researcher." The background is slightly blurred, suggesting a classroom or learning environment with other individuals present. The focus on the devices and hands indicates an emphasis on digital learning tools and their use in education.
